summary: For 4D-tensor x 2D-matrix matmul custom ops, flatten the leading three dimensions into M but keep host tiling conservative: use GetOriginShape(), SetDim(1), small SetFixSplit(16,16,-1), and set blockDim from cubeTilingData.get_usedCoreNum() to avoid runtime do-tiling failure on small ND shapes.
